steps.title: Substitute x=4 into g(x) and set equal to 31
steps.content: We know that $g(4) = 31$. Substitute $x = 4$ into the function definition $g(x) = 5x + a$:$$g(4) = 5(4) + a = 31.$$Solve for a.

steps.title: Calculate and solve for a
steps.content:
$20 + a = 31$, so subtracting 20 from both sides we get $a = 11$.
That confirms C is correct.
